hero.badge: 100% free · not betting, not predictions, not gambling
hero.title: Every goal can
hero.subtitle: Pick 3 matches. On every goal, you get an alert and scratch your card. Earn points and prizes from our partners. Game on.

how.title: The game in 30 seconds
how.subtitle: No football knowledge needed. A rookie can beat an expert.

steps.title: Pick 3 matches
steps.text: Before kick-off, select your 3 matches of the day.

steps.title: Get the alert
steps.text: On every goal in your selection, a notification lands.

steps.title: Scratch your card
steps.text: A one-and-a-half second animation, and the suspense builds.

steps.title: Reveal your win
steps.text: Points for the leaderboard, or a prize from a partner.

items.title: Surprise reward
items.text: You never know what's under the card. All the thrill, zero risk.

items.title: Right now
items.text: The scratch hits the instant a goal is scored. Emotion and reward, no delay.

items.title: Free for all
items.text: No stake, no barrier. Anyone can play and win.

items.title: Double stakes
items.text: A prize right away, plus the race up the leaderboard over time.

items.title: The match, better
items.text: One more reason to follow the game, without staring at the screen.

items.title: Made to share
items.text: Send a win to your friends, and the crew grows on its own.

summer.title: All summer, football becomes a game
summer.lead: The biggest fixtures of summer 2026, with a scratch card on every goal. The more you follow, the more you scratch.
summer.after: And it doesn't stop: we then continue across the French, English, Italian, Spanish, German and Belgian leagues.

items.q: Is Renard des Surfaces really free?
items.a: Yes, completely. No stake, no payment to play. The app is funded by its partners.

items.q: Is it gambling or sports betting?
items.a: No. Renard des Surfaces is not betting, not predictions, and not gambling. You stake nothing and win no real money: you earn points and prizes offered by brands.
On every goal in your selection, you scratch a card. It can reveal points for the leaderboard or an instant prize from a partner.

items.q: Do I need to know football?
items.a: Not at all. You pick your matches, the goals do the rest. A beginner can beat a die-hard fan.

items.q: Which matches can I play on?
items.a: On the biggest fixtures of summer 2026, then on the main European leagues throughout the season.

finalCta.title: Ready to turn every goal into a win?
finalCta.subtitle: Download the app, pick your matches, and let the goals decide.

partners.title: The only ad format tied to a moment of joy
partners.subtitle: At the moment of the goal, your brand offers the prize. Precise targeting, active engagement, and a brand image tied to winning — not to interruption.

cards.title: Sponsoring
cards.text: Your logo tied to the matches, shown to players at the peak of attention.

cards.title: Branded prizes
cards.text: You provide your own prizes (vouchers, codes, products): measurable footfall to your stores.

cards.title: Partnerships
cards.text: Exclusive experiences in exchange for visibility, with no prize cost.

funnel.title: The prize isn't a reward, it's a doorway
